name: BrowserMCP — AI Browser Control via MCP
description: Turn Chrome into an MCP server. Let AI agents control your browser: navigate, click, fill forms, extract content, take screenshots. Zero setup — no npm, no bridge process.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*
